name: Adding a Shopify Integration
body:
[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Maropost Marketing Cloud lets you easily create and manage multiple integrations with your Shopify accounts."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"To learn about the integration, see "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Integration-with-Shopify","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Integration with Shopify","bold":true}]},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"In Navigation, click INTEGRATIONS and then select Shopify to go to the Shopify Integration index page. If you don't have any existing integrations with Shopify, you'll see the Integration Settings dialog box to add a new integration instead of the index page."}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/integration2.05T5g000018nEYgEAM.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/integration2.05T5g000018nEYgEAM.png","name":"Shopify_Integration_Index.png","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":525,"width":700}}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Actions you can perform on an existing Shopify integration setup:"}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Change the Status","bold":true},{"text":" – To activate or disable an integration, from the Actions drop-down on the Shopify Integrations index page, select Enable or Disable for the respective action."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Edit","bold":true},{"text":" – You can only update the Maropost list selected for the integration. On the Shopify Integrations index page, from the Actions menu, select Edit."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Delete","bold":true},{"text":" – To delete an integration, go to the Shopify account, and from the Apps section, select and delete the Maropost app that you installed during the integration setup."}]}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h3","children":[{"text":"Steps to Add a Shopify Integration"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Perform the following steps in Marketing Cloud to add an integration with Shopify:"}]},{"type":"ol","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"In Navigation, go to "},{"text":"INTEGRATIONS","bold":true},{"text":", and then select "},{"text":"Shopify","bold":true},{"text":" on the "},{"text":"Integrations","bold":true},{"text":" page."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"If this is your first Shopify integration, the "},{"text":"Integration Settings","bold":true},{"text":" page opens. However, if you have any previously created Shopify integration, the "},{"text":"Shopify Integration","bold":true},{"text":" index page opens where you can click the "},{"text":"Add","bold":true},{"text":" button to open the "},{"text":"Integration Settings","bold":true},{"text":" dialog box."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"On the "},{"text":"Shopify Integration","bold":true},{"text":" page, click "},{"text":"Add","bold":true},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"On the "},{"text":"Integration Settings","bold":true},{"text":" dialog box, enter the integration details.
"}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/integration3.05T5g000018nFl0EAE.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/integration3.05T5g000018nFl0EAE.png","name":"User-added image","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":525,"width":700}},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Shop Name:","bold":true},{"text":" Enter a suitable shop name for your Shopify integration."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Shop URL","bold":true},{"text":": Enter your Shopify store’s URL. For example, if your Shopify URL is 'Magellan-stores.shopify.com', then enter 'Magellan-Stores.shopify.com' in this field."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Select Email List","bold":true},{"text":": Select the Marketing Cloud "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Email-Contact-Lists-Overview","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"email contact list","bold":true}]},{"text":" into which you want to import the Shopify buyers."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Select SMS List","bold":true},{"text":": Select the Marketing Cloud "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/SMS-Contact-Lists","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"SMS contact list","bold":true}]},{"text":" into which you want to import the SMS contact details such as phone number and consent status."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Abandoned Cart Delay:","bold":true},{"text":" If a customer has abandoned their shopping carts and you would like to send emails to alert them of their pending purchase, select the timing information under the "},{"text":"Abandoned Cart Delay","bold":true},{"text":" section. This option allows you to send timely reminders to your potential customers and nudge them to complete their orders."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Sync historical data","bold":true},{"text":": Select the check box to import the historical data from Shopify to Marketing Cloud."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"📋 "},{"text":"Note","bold":true},{"text":": "}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Shopify will trigger an alert and notify the account owner if a user leaves their cart abandoned for approximately "},{"text":"30 minutes","bold":true},{"text":"."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Once the cart is abandoned, Shopify sends its details to Maropost Marketing Cloud via "},{"text":"webhook","bold":true},{"text":" ("},{"text":"HTTP request","bold":true},{"text":")."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"
"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Click "},{"text":"CONNECT","bold":true},{"text":". Your integration details are saved and then you are redirected to a page in your Shopify account where you can install the Maropost app for Shopify."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"After completion of the Maropost app installation, the integration is added and a confirmation page is displayed with the integration details. Here, you can also see the mapping between Shopify fields and Maropost fields. See "},{"type":"a","url":"https://galaxy.maropost.com/s/article/Integration-with-Shopify","target":"_blank","children":[{"text":"Integration with Shopify","bold":true}]},{"text":" for a tabular depiction of mappings between the fields.
"}]},{"type":"rich_embed_card","children":[{"text":""}],"dataSourceType":"image","url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/05T5g00000BkWy2.05T5g00000BkWy2EAF.png","embedData":{"url":"https://us.v-cdn.net/6038474/uploads/attachments/migrated/05T5g00000BkWy2.05T5g00000BkWy2EAF.png","name":"Shopify_Integration_Confirmation.png","embedType":"image","float":"none","height":525,"width":700}},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"
"},{"text":"📋 "},{"text":"Note","bold":true},{"text":": With the help of frontend and backend implementations, customers can manually create and map fields (including custom fields) in their Marketing Cloud accounts."},{"text":"
"}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Finally, click "},{"text":"Done","bold":true},{"text":"."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"The newly added integration is now added, and you can view it on the Shopify Integration index page."}]}]
